name: Does workers comp cover prosthetics for hand loss from work chemicals in Draper?

mainEntity.name: Does workers comp cover prosthetics for hand loss from work chemicals in Draper?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, for occupational diseases causing permanent loss.[6] Includes medical, prosthetics.[6] Key factors: (1) Job-related; (2) Doctor prescribed; (3) Wage replacement too.[6] File, get approval; covers fully.[6] Essential benefit.
